untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 9-month historical price momentum calculation and percentile-based ranking across a universe of stocks. The allowed indicators set does not include a pre-computed momentum indicator or cross-sectional ranking mechanism. The signal logic requires: (1) computing returns over a 9-month lookback period, (2) ranking all eligible stocks by this metric, (3) selecting top 20% by momentum, and (4) rebalancing quarterly. This requires portfolio-level cross-sectional analysis and dynamic ranking, which cannot be expressed as point-in-time boolean conditions on a single asset using the provided indicator list.
translation_notes: The signal is fundamentally a relative momentum strategy requiring universe ranking and portfolio construction. Standard OHLCV indicators and technical overlays cannot capture the cross-sectional percentile logic needed. A proper implementation would require a custom momentum indicator computed over rolling 9-month windows with percentile bucketing across the asset universe.
